{"id":"project-LICHEN-g7mt","title":"edhoc: process_message_1 ignores METHOD from Message 1","description":"File: python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py
Lines: 517-530

EdhocResponder.process_message_1 decodes METHOD_CORR from Message 1 but ignores it:

```python
items = _decode_cbor_sequence(msg1)
# ...
suites_i = items[1]
self._g_x = items[2]
self._c_i = _decode_connection_id(items[3])
```

The method (items[0] // 4) is never extracted or validated against self.method. This means:

1. If initiator sends METHOD=1 (SIGN_STATIC) but responder expects METHOD=0 (SIGN_SIGN), no error is raised
2. The responder proceeds with its own self.method value regardless of what the initiator requested
3. This can cause interoperability failures or security issues (e.g., responder does static-DH when initiator expects signature)

Fix: Extract method from items[0], verify it matches self.method or dynamically adjust authentication based on negotiated method.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:45.964391Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:45.964434Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-g7mt","title":"edhoc: process_message_1 ignores METHOD from Message 1","description":"File: python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py
Lines: 517-530

EdhocResponder.process_message_1 decodes METHOD_CORR from Message 1 but ignores it:

```python
items = _decode_cbor_sequence(msg1)
# ...
suites_i = items[1]
self._g_x = items[2]
self._c_i = _decode_connection_id(items[3])
```

The method (items[0] // 4) is never extracted or validated against self.method. This means:

1. If initiator sends METHOD=1 (SIGN_STATIC) but responder expects METHOD=0 (SIGN_SIGN), no error is raised
2. The responder proceeds with its own self.method value regardless of what the initiator requested
3. This can cause interoperability failures or security issues (e.g., responder does static-DH when initiator expects signature)

Fix: Extract method from items[0], verify it matches self.method or dynamically adjust authentication based on negotiated method.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:45.964391Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:22:11.135440947Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:22:11.135440947Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:27:11.135440947Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:22:11.135440947Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: e9404b451\nprocess_message_1 now extracts and validates both METHOD and CORR from Message 1 items[0]. Raises on mismatch (per RFC 9528). Previously ignored, now enforces configured method."}
process_message_1 now fully parses METHOD_CORR, validates method matches configured self.method and corr is valid. Prevents mismatch between initiator/responder authentication modes.
